name: Dable
description: Dables personalized content recommendation and native-ad SDK for Korean, Japanese and SEA publishers.

seo.title: Dable — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Dable: Dables personalized content recommendation and native-ad SDK for Korean, Japanese and SEA publishers.

when_to_use: Native ad and content recommendation monetization for Korean publishers
Personalized content discovery ads for Japanese media platforms
Native ad SDK integration for SEA news and media apps
Incrementally monetizing editorial content with recommendation widgets

pros: Dominant native recommendation in Korea and Japan
Content discovery UX feels native not ad-like
cons: English support thin for non-APAC teams
review.verdict: Specialist APAC native SSP, essential if you monetize Korean or Japanese traffic, irrelevant elsewhere.
review.best_for: Content publishers with significant KR, JP, or Southeast Asian audience.
review.not_for: Western publishers or apps needing video, rewarded, or banner formats.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
